edges.source: IMMEDIATELY, or I will be forced to ask for a full refund and share my disappointing experience with others

empathetic_output.support_response: Can you please provide me with more details on what happened after you updated the drivers last week? Any error messages or any specific behaviors that you noticed before the laptop started draining quickly again? This information will help us investigate further and find an appropriate resolution for you.
empathetic_output.defactualized_prompt: I am <CUSTOMER_NAME> my <PRODUCT>, which I bought just 3 weeks ago with order number <PRODUCT>. Despite updating the drivers as suggested by your support team LAST WEEK, the battery is STILL DRAINING COMPLETELY WITHIN 2 HOURS OF A FULL CHARGE. I have a critical deadline to meet tomorrow and I EXPECT A FUNCTIONING LAPTOP, NOT ONE THAT CAN'T EVEN LAST HALF A DAY. I demand a proper solution to this problem <ISSUE>.
empathetic_output.raw_steered_output: Can you please provide me with more details on what happened after you updated the drivers last week? Any error messages or any specific behaviors that you noticed before the laptop started draining quickly again? This information will help us investigate further and find an appropriate resolution for you.

formal_output.support_response: Our technical team will conduct an investigation into the matter immediately and provide a resolution within the shortest possible timeframe. In the meantime, we recommend using the laptop on power supply only until further notice to prevent any inconvenience caused by the issue. Please expect our response via email once the issue has been resolved.
